note: Single registry for every skill: curated author + tags + local path, plus upstream provenance (repo/path/ref/update) for vendored skills. Consumed by web/scripts/build-index.mjs (catalog) and scripts/sync-skills.mjs (upstream sync). `update` controls vendored skill sync: off skips the entry, auto updates and allows auto-merge when all updates are auto, manual updates but keeps the PR open for review. Skills without `repo` are authored locally.
